questions.stem: A rectangle has length 5 cm and width 11 cm. What is its perimeter?
questions.visual_alt: Rectangle with length 5 cm and width 11 cm

diagnostics.2: Forgets to multiply by 2 for perimeter

hint.level_0: Perimeter = 2 × (length + width)
hint.level_1: Use the formula with length = 5 and width = 11.

solution_steps: Compare or calculate the angle asked

questions.stem: Li Hua has 21 egg tarts to share equally among 2 friends. How many does each get, and how many are left over?

hint.level_0: Divide and find what's left over.

questions.stem: Which fraction is equal to 2/5?
questions.visual_alt: Fraction bar showing 2/5

hint.level_0: When denominators are the same, just work with numerators.
hint.level_1: For equivalent fractions, multiply top and bottom by the same number.
hint.level_2: Same denominator: 2/5 operation on numerator only.

solution_steps: Count how many in each group
